---
title: "Henry Norton-Bower (He/Him)"
image: /static/images/temp.jpeg
---

## About Me

I'm a Computer Science and Mathematics student at St. Olaf College with a 
concentration in Statistics. I enjoy solving and working through problems. Recently i have been working a online multiplier version of mastermind.

Outside of academics I like being outside. Nordic skiing is one my favorite 
winter activities, and when it gets warmer i just enjoy being in the sun. I also enjoy playing game, both board games and video games. Recently it has been a lot of Kerbal Space Program.

![Kerbal Space Progarm](/static/images/temp.jpeg)

## Education

- **BA, Computer Science & Mathematics** | St. Olaf College | 2027

## Experience

- Computer Science/Mathematics TA | St. Olaf College | September 2024 - present
    - Assisted students in understanding programming concepts through one-on-one guidance and group instruction, enhancing their problem-solving and coding skills.
    - Collaborated with the professor to review and enhance assignments, ensuring clarity of instructions, alignment with learning objectives.


## Skills & Expertise

- C++, Python, R, Rust, Go, SQL, HTML, CSS
- Git, Visual Studio Code, R Studio, Google Workspace.

## Contact

- My Website [Henrynorton-bower.com](https://henrynortonbower.com)
- LinkedIn: [henry-norton-bower-282044335/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/henry-norton-bower-282044335/)
- GitHub: [github.com/HenryN-B](https://github.com/HenryN-B)
